info.title: Routero AI Gateway API
info.description:
Replace this file with the live OpenAPI spec from your Routero instance.

Run: curl https://api.routero.ai/openapi.json > assets/openapi.json

Or automate it in .github/workflows/deploy.yml by adding a step before the Jekyll build:
  - run: curl -sf https://api.routero.ai/openapi.json > assets/openapi.json
